title: NALCO Non-Executive Vacancy 2026, Apply Online for 268 Technician, Operator and More Posts -
how_to_apply: Visit the official website https://mudira.nalcoindia.co.in/rec_portal/default.aspx Find and click the “Recruitment Link” or “Apply Online” link on the homepage. First, register – enter your name, email, mobile number, and password. After registering, log in and focus on the application form—specifically, the personal details, qualifications, and selection of the position. Upload required documents: Photograph (JPG, max 50KB), Signature (JPG, max 20KB), Educational Certificates, ID Proof, Caste Certificate (if applicable). Pay the
jobs_info: NALCO Non-Executive Vacancy 2026: National Aluminum Company Limited (NALCO) has issued a notification for the position of Non-Executive. The recruitment drive comprises 272 vacancies. All eligible and interested candidates are advised to carefully read the official notification and apply before 10-06-2026, the last Date. All relevant information regarding the NALCO Non-Executive Vacancy 2026 recruitment is provided below.

Latest Updates Check Here
Operator (HEMM) Gr. III

10th Pass with ITI (NCVT/NCVET) of 2 years duration in Mechanic Motor Vehicle (MMV) trade OR 1 year duration in Diesel Mechanic Trade Apprenticeship Certificate in MMV or Diesel Mechanic Trade required Valid Heavy Vehicle Driving Licence mandatory First Aid Training Certificate desirable
Mining Mate Gr. III
10th Pass Valid Mining Mate Certificate of Competency (Restricted to Opencast Metalliferous Mines) issued by DGMS First Aid Certificate preferred
Jr. Foreman (Mines)
Diploma in Mining / Mining Engineering Valid Mining Foreman Certificate of Competency (Restricted to Opencast Metalliferous Mines) issued by DGMS
Jr. Foreman (Electrical)

Full-time Diploma in Electrical Engineering from a recognized University/Institution Valid Supervisory Certificate of Competency (M.V/H.T/E.H.T) issued by the Electrical Licensing Board, Odisha covering Mining installations
SUPT (JOT)-Operator & Operator Gr. III

10th Pass with ITI (NCVT/NCVET) in Electronics Mechanic / Technician Mechatronics / Electrician / Instrumentation / Instrument Mechanic / Fitter Trade (2 years duration) Apprenticeship Certificate required
SUPT (JOT)-Fitter & Technician (Fitter) Gr. III
10th Pass with ITI (NCVT/NCVET) in Fitter Trade (2 years duration) Apprenticeship Certificate required
SUPT (JOT)-Electrical & Technician (Electrical) Gr. III
10th Pass with ITI (NCVT/NCVET) in Electrician Trade (2 years duration) Apprenticeship Certificate required
SUPT (JOT)-Laboratory
B.Sc. (Hons) in Chemistry
SUPT (JOT)-Instrumentation / Instrument Mechanic & Technician (Instrumentation / Instrument Mechanic) Gr. III
10th Pass with ITI (NCVT/NCVET) in Instrumentation / Instrument Mechanic Trade (2 years duration) Apprenticeship Certificate required
